name: Mint Blossom Pie (with Minted Apple Slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Light and airy as spring itself! The glistening apple garnish puts this billowy pie in the glamour class.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water according to package instructions.
3. Heat apple sauce, sugar, salt, and marshmallows over low heat, stirring frequently until marshmallows melt.
4. Remove from heat and add softened gelatin to hot mixture, stirring until dissolved.
5. Chill until partially congealed.
6. Beat whipping cream until fluffy.
7. Gradually beat in lemon juice until stiff.
8. Fold the whipped cream into the beaten gelatin mixture.
9. Pour one-half of the mixture into the baked pie shell.
10. Tint the remaining filling light green with a few drops of green food coloring and add peppermint extract.
11. Spoon the green layer carefully over the light layer.
12. Chill until congealed.
13. Garnish top of pie with minted apple slices.
Minted Apple Slices:
1. Core and pare 2 medium firm apples.
2. Cut each into 8 or 10 slices.
3. Combine 1 cup sugar, 1 cup water, 1/4 teaspoon peppermint extract, and a few drops green food coloring in a pan.
4. Bring to boil and add apple slices.
5. Simmer until apples are transparent, about 5 minutes, turning once.
6. Cool in syrup.
7. For a sophisticated touch, add 2 tablespoons crème de menthe to the syrup as it cools.
8. Drain apples on absorbent paper.
9. Arrange on top of pie.
